package rulecoverage

func PositivePreloadRulesScatteredAcrossLayers() string {
    ruleID := "preload_rules_scattered_across_layers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Preload decisions spread across handlers, services, and repositories instead of one query owner."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
